author: skysports
text:
One month from today: Chelsea vs Manchester City, Carabao Cup final, Wembley 🏆

Who's lifting it? #CarabaoCup

author: danny
text: 54%??? FIVE STRAIGHT WINS. SIX PAST WOLVES. WENT TO THE EMIRATES AND KNOCKED THE LEAGUE LEADERS OUT TO GET THERE. The disrespect is actually fuel at this point. See you at Wembley 😤💙

quote.author: skysports
quote.text: One month from today: Chelsea vs Manchester City, Carabao Cup final, Wembley 🏆 Who's lifting it?

author: ornstein
text: 🚨 Special report: Inside Xabi Alonso's Chelsea rebuild — 12 signings, 8 major departures (including Cole Palmer and Reece James), one non-negotiable idea. Sources at Cobham describe the clearest tactical identity the club has had in a decade. Full piece @TheAthleticFC

author: terry
text: Right. Five wins on the bounce, a cup final booked. Time to re-run the most controversial poll in this account's history. Be honest:

author: sue
text:
March: Arsenal away. Villa away. Cup quarter-final. Newcastle. Everton away. And then a final. Against City. At Wembley.

I have never felt so alive and so nauseous at the same time.

author: marcus
text:
Chelsea in February: P5 W5. 12 scored, 3 conceded.

A cup semi won at the Emirates, a six-goal away day, two grown-up 1-0s. The underlying numbers finally match the eye test — this team peaks at the exact right moment of the season. 🧵👇

author: optajoe
text:
14 & 14 - Enzo Fernández and João Pedro have both reached 14 goals in all competitions for Chelsea this season. Supply lines: João Neves and Anthony Gordon, 8 assists each.

Symmetry. 💙

author: enzo
text: Otra victoria más 💙 Gracias Bridge, siempre con nosotros. Ahora el Emirates. VAMOS!

author: gordon
text: Five in a row. Bridge was rocking again 💙 Big March ahead. On to the next one.

author: chelseafc
text:
FT: Chelsea 1-0 Burnley 🔵

Five wins on the spin. Clean sheet. Job done.

Next up: the Emirates. 💪 #CHEBUR

author: terry
text:
1-0 at home to Burnley and the timeline is planning the trophy parade. It's BURNLEY. Win at the Emirates next Sunday and THEN I'll smile.

(Good three points, mind. Clean sheet. Cubarsí immense again. But standards.)

author: chloe
text: Genuinely obsessed with the fact we can bring Kubo, Nusa AND Yılmaz off the bench now. Squad depth used to mean "pray nobody gets injured". Now it's a flex. Xabi built an army.

author: fabrizio
text: 🚨🔵 Understand Chelsea have opened internal talks over a new long-term contract for Moisés Caicedo — club consider him untouchable and the heart of Xabi Alonso's project. No release clause planned. More soon. #CFC

author: sue
text:
Saw Cole Palmer trending tonight and had a tiny breakdown about it, as is tradition.

Then I remembered we've won every game this month and Enzo has FOURTEEN goals. Healing isn't linear but it is happening.

author: optajoe
text:
🧱 No Chelsea player has more ball recoveries, progressive carries out of defence or completed passes into the final third this season than Moisés Caicedo.

The anchor of everything. #CFC

author: chloe
text: Mid-February check-in, cup final loading. Player of the season so far — and be serious, not just your favourite 💙

author: chelseafc
text:
FT: Grimsby Town 0-1 Chelsea 🔵

Into the FA Cup quarter-finals — Birmingham City at the Bridge next month. 🏆 #FACup

author: terry
text:
Away at Grimsby. February. Freezing. Pitch like a farmer's field. 1-0, everyone home safe, into the quarters.

THAT is a proper cup performance. In my day we'd have drawn it and lost the replay under the lights. Progress.

author: skysports
text:
FT: Chelsea 2-1 Leeds.

Three wins in a week for Xabi Alonso's side, who stay firmly in the top four and keep the pressure on the leaders. #CHELEE

author: marcus
text:
Wolves 1-6 Chelsea: 4.9 xG. A record in my spreadsheet, which goes back to 2016.

26 box touches for the front line. Gordon and Neves involved in everything. I ran the numbers twice because I did not believe them the first time.

author: joaopedro
text: What a night 🔥 SIX goals away from home?? This team is something special. Deus é fiel 🙏💙

author: gaz
text: Wolves are in a relegation scrap and Chelsea fans are acting like they just won the Champions League 😂 wake me up when you do it against an actual top side

thread.author: chloe
thread.text: The Emirates. February 3rd. Cup semi-final. 2-1. You were there Gaz, we all saw your story x

author: danny
text: SIX. AWAY FROM HOME. IT COULD HAVE BEEN TEN. THIS IS THE BEST CHELSEA SIDE I'VE SEEN SINCE I WAS A KID AND I'M NOT EVEN EXAGGERATING FOR ENGAGEMENT 😭💙 #WOLCHE

author: skysports
text:
FT: Wolves 1-6 Chelsea.

SIX for the Blues at Molineux — the biggest away win of the Xabi Alonso era. Ruthless, relentless, terrifying. #WOLCHE

author: ornstein
text: Understand there is genuine belief inside Chelsea this squad can compete on every front this season. Hierarchy see the Carabao final as the moment the rebuild announces itself + last-16 Champions League place secured directly via top-6 league-phase finish exceeded internal expectations @TheAthleticFC

author: danny
text: WEMBLEYYYYY 😭😭💙 WE BEAT THEM IN THEIR OWN HOUSE. THE REBUILD HAS A FINAL. Booking March 22 off work the second HR opens tomorrow.

author: terry
text:
Beating Arsenal at their place in a cup semi is proper Chelsea. PROPER Chelsea.

Now listen carefully because I've seen this film: it means NOTHING if we don't finish the job against City. Ask anyone with an old season ticket.

author: sue
text:
I cried a little at full-time. Do not quote-tweet this.

We beat Arsenal, at theirs, in a semi-final, with half a team that was signed six months ago. Whatever happens at Wembley — this project is real.

author: gaz
text: Carabao Cup is a Mickey Mouse trophy anyway. We're clear at the top of the ACTUAL competition. Enjoy your little day out at Wembley x

thread.author: danny
thread.text: Mickey Mouse trophy and yet you played your strongest XI and your whole end went silent at the second goal. Interesting! 💙

author: chelseafc
text:
FULL-TIME: Arsenal 1-2 Chelsea 🔵

WE ARE GOING TO WEMBLEY!!! 🏆💙 #CarabaoCup

author: skysports
text:
FT: Arsenal 1-2 Chelsea (Carabao Cup semi-final).

Chelsea knock the league leaders out at the Emirates and will face Manchester City in the final at Wembley on March 22. A statement from Xabi Alonso's side. #ARSCHE
